httpHeaderAuth.name: GitHub PR Security Scanner — Webhook Trigger auth
GitHub PR Security Scanner — Respond to Webhook auth

parameters.url: =https://api.github.com/repos/{{ $('Validate PR Event Fields').first().json.repo_full_name }}/pulls/{{ $('Validate PR Event Fields').first().json.pr_number }}/files

nodes.name: Prepare Diff and Metadata for LLM
Analyze Diff With LLM Security Prompt

parameters.body:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-3-5-haiku-20241022', max_tokens: 1024, system: 'You are a strict security code reviewer. Analyze the provided pull request diff for security risks. Be precise and conservative — only flag issues you are highly confident (>80%) are genuine security concerns. Do NOT flag normal code patterns. Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object matching this exact schema: {"risk_level": "none|low|medium|high", "findings": [{"category": "hardcoded_secret|risky_dependency|auth_authz_change|sql_injection|dangerous_function|other", "severity": "low|medium|high", "file": "filename", "line_hint": "approximate line or diff hunk", "description": "concise one-sentence description", "confidence": "low|medium|high"}], "summary": "one sentence overall summary", "false_positive_risk": "low|medium|high"}. If no findings, return risk_level none with empty findings array.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'PR Title: ' + $json.pr_title + '
Repository: ' + $json.repo_full_name + '
Files changed (' + $json.file_count + '): ' + $json.file_names + '

Diff:
' + $json.diff_text + '

Analyze this PR diff for security risks. Return JSON only.' }] }) }}

nodes.name: Post Security Findings Comment to GitHub
Preserve Report Data After Comment Post
Request Security Team Review on GitHub

parameters.url: =https://api.github.com/repos/{{ $('Parse LLM Security Report').first().json.repo_full_name }}/pulls/{{ $('Parse LLM Security Report').first().json.pr_number }}/requested_reviewers

nodes.name: Send High Risk Alert to Slack Security Channel
Check If Should Escalate to Security Team
Send Infrastructure Error Alert to Slack

body.text:
=:warning: *PR Security Scanner — Infrastructure Error (Silent Failure)*

The security scanner encountered an error and could not complete analysis. No comment was posted on the PR.

*Workflow:* GitHub PR Security Scanner
*Time:* {{ new Date().toISOString() }}

Please check n8n execution logs for details.
